name: Bwp Group
analysis: BWP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.8900, stop A$3.6729, target A$4.5413 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
